name: Gram (prev. Toncoin)
analysis: GRAM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (5.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at $0.2635. Trade idea: entry $1.6555, stop $0.0008, target $6.6196 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
